status_summary: The official PRC TLA files are not complete enough to act as AS executable Universal Cell or command-semantics authority.

tla_witnesses.summary: Partial Universal Cell skeleton with constants, variables, Init, Activate, and an unfinished Wire branch.

universal_cell_status.summary: The partial TLA sketch reaches an unfinished Wire definition and does not define a complete Next action or role-specific transition system.

command_semantics_status.summary: The official TLA files do not contain command-buffer, standard-signal command-token, or write-buffer command-token semantics.

as_boundary: Do not use the official TLA files as executable Universal Cell authority until a complete specification with Next, role transitions, and command semantics is recovered or constructed.
